description: Returns the branch short circuit currents arriving at IBUS following activity SCMU. This API routine was first introduced in release 28.0.0. ierr, cmpval = scbrn2(ibus, jbus, ickt, string)
python_syntax: ierr, cmpval = scbrn2(ibus, jbus, ickt, string)

parameters.name: string
parameters.description: String indicating the short circuit current desired. (input).

error_codes.description: ‘SCINIT’ not successfully called; ‘P’ and ‘Q’ or ‘CMPVAL’ unchanged.
Bus not found; ‘P’ and ‘Q’ or ‘CMPVAL’ unchanged.
Branch not found; ‘P’ and ‘Q’ or ‘CMPVAL’ unchanged.
Bad value of ‘STRING1’; ‘P’ and ‘Q’ or ‘CMPVAL’ unchanged.
Branch out of service; ‘P’ and ‘Q’ of 0.0 or ‘CMPVAL’ of (0.0,0.0) returned.
